Alan Mak MP

Member of Parliament for the Havant Constituency

As your local Member of Parliament, I work hard for our community all year round.  

Sign up for my newsletter and follow me on Facebook to stay in touch.

Alan Mak MP Newsletter

The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

Ask Keir Starmer

to apologise to pensioners for removing the Winter Fuel Payment.

An estimated 20,000 pensioners across our local area lost up to £300 in support last year. Sign Alan's petition calling on Keir Starmer to apologise. 

Sign the petition
